moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships continue at the All England Club, with the singles finals approaching this weekend on July 11th and 12th.

angles.name: Men's & Ladies' Finals
angles.copy: It's Finals Week at Wimbledon! Who will lift the coveted trophies this weekend? Tune in for all the drama on the grass. #Wimbledon

angles.name: Quarter-finals today
angles.copy: The tension is building at Wimbledon as the Quarter-finals unfold today! Every serve, every volley, every point counts. #Wimbledon2026

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 enters the Quarter-finals stage from Thursday, July 9th, with major clashes including France vs. Morocco and England vs. Norway.

angles.name: Quarter-finals preview
angles.copy: The World Cup Quarter-finals begin tomorrow! France, England, and other giants battle it out for a spot in the semis. Who are you backing? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: England in the Quarters
angles.copy: England are in the World Cup Quarter-finals! Get ready for Saturday's massive clash against Norway. It's coming home? #England #ThreeLions

moments.title: UK Set for Another Heatwave
moments.blurb: Forecasters predict a new heatwave for the UK, with temperatures set to rise across England and Wales from this weekend, potentially reaching 35C+ in some southern areas.

angles.name: Heatwave warnings
angles.copy: Another UK heatwave is on the way! Temperatures could soar to 35C+ this weekend. Stay hydrated and safe in the sun. #UKHeatwave

angles.name: Summer vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out, fun's out! Get ready for a scorching weekend as a new heatwave hits the UK. Who's heading to the beach or firing up the BBQ? #SummerVibes

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a multi-award-winning rock and indie music festival, is happening now in Gloucestershire from July 8-11.

angles.name: Festival kicks off
angles.copy: It's kicking off at 2000trees! The rock and indie festival is live in Gloucestershire this week. Who's there and who are you seeing?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for July 2nd - July 8th has been released, featuring new entries from sombr, HUGEL, Ultra Nate & Imael Angel, Gracie Abrams, and Aitch.

angles.name: Chart rundown
angles.copy: Fresh music alert! The new UK Singles Chart is out now. What's your favourite new entry from sombr, Gracie Abrams, or Aitch?

angles.name: New chart hits
angles.copy: From dance anthems to pop bangers, the latest UK Singles Chart is packed with fresh tunes. What's on repeat for you this week? #NewMusic

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Beck!
moments.blurb: American indie rock icon Beck, known for hits like 'Loser' and 'Where It's At', turns 56 today.

angles.name: Beck's 56th
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the genre-bending genius, Beck! What's your go-to track from his incredible catalogue?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Sky Ferreira!
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, model, and actress Sky Ferreira celebrates her 34th birthday today.

angles.name: Sky's 34th
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 34th Birthday to the brilliant Sky Ferreira! Which of her tracks is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Joan Osborne!
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated American singer-songwriter Joan Osborne, known for 'One of Us', turns 64 today.

angles.name: Joan's 64th
angles.copy: Happy 64th Birthday to the incredible Joan Osborne! Still singing 'One of Us' at the top of your lungs? We are! #JoanOsborne

moments.title: New Thriller 'The Dark' on ITV
moments.blurb: A new six-part murder drama, 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside and starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres on ITV and ITVX on July 12.

angles.name: Scottish thriller
angles.copy: Get ready for a chilling new drama! 'The Dark', a murder mystery set in the Scottish wilderness, starts this Sunday on ITV and ITVX. #TheDark

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix this Sunday, July 12th, catching up with the cast.

angles.name: Reality TV catch-up
angles.copy: Did they say 'I do'? Find out what happened next for the couples of Love is Blind: UK as 'After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday! #LoveIsBlindUK

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the quirky new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', which premieres on July 11th.

angles.name: New BBC comedy
angles.copy: Diane Morgan is back! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' hits the BBC this Saturday. Get ready for some dry wit and laughs. #AnnDroid

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival in London
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace Park in London hosts the Kaleidoscope Festival on Saturday, July 11th, featuring music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: London festival vibes
angles.copy: London! Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace Park this Saturday for a day of music, laughs, and good times. Who's in?

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival in Newcastle
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival brings its unique electronic music experience to Newcastle this Saturday, July 11th.

angles.name: Newcastle dance
angles.copy: Newcastle, get ready! Lost Minds Festival is happening this Saturday, bringing the biggest beats and the best vibes. #LostMinds

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, officially begins its tournament play on Thursday, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with practice days starting July 12th.

angles.name: Golf's biggest major
angles.copy: The Claret Jug is on the line! The Open Championship practice days start this Sunday, with tournament play kicking off at Royal Birkdale next Thursday. #TheOpen

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Courtney Love!
moments.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, turns 62 tomorrow.

angles.name: Courtney's 62nd
angles.copy: Wishing a fierce Happy 62nd Birthday to the iconic Courtney Love tomorrow! What's your favourite Hole track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Linda Ronstadt!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across multiple genres, turns 80 on July 15th.

angles.name: Linda's 80th
angles.copy: A huge Happy 80th Birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on July 15th! Celebrate her incredible career with your favourite song.

moments.title: Happy Birthday, M.I.A.!
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, songwriter, and record producer M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam), famous for 'Paper Planes', turns 51 on July 18th.

angles.name: M.I.A.'s 51st
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the groundbreaking M.I.A. on July 18th! Still blasting 'Paper Planes'?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Daron Malakian!
moments.blurb: System Of A Down guitarist and vocalist Daron Malakian turns 51 on July 18th.

angles.name: Daron's 51st
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to System Of A Down's Daron Malakian on July 18th! What's your favourite SOAD riff?

moments.title: Happy Birthday, Jack Irons!
moments.blurb: Former Red Hot Chili Peppers and Pearl Jam drummer Jack Irons celebrates his 64th birthday on July 18th.

angles.name: Jack's 64th
angles.copy: A big Happy 64th Birthday to the incredible Jack Irons on July 18th! From RHCP to Pearl Jam, a true drumming legend.
